negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: physics_010
prompt: The video opens with a static shot of a woven basket hanging from a rope with a strong magnet attached at the top, positioned above an orange tennis ball placed on a wooden table. The background is a plain white wall, and the lighting is even, highlighting the textures of the basket and the ball. The basket slowly descends, covering the tennis ball completely. As the basket reaches the ball, it begins to lift upwards, demonstrating the magnetic force overcoming the gravitational pull. The basket continues to rise until it is fully above the ball, which remains stationary on the table. The final frame shows the basket hovering above the ball, with the tennis ball still on the table below.  A medium shot of a suspended object interacting with another object on a flat surface.
